overlay_content.name: Overlay Content
overlay_content.value: Genuine Nissan Accessories deliver the fit, reliability, and performance of your Frontier's original parts. [*] Images shown for illustrative purposes only. For complete information concerning warranty coverage, conditions, limitations, and exclusions, contact your Nissan dealer and read the product warranty information.

FRONTIER EXTERIOR ACCESSORIES

Make a lasting impression

Stand out with a wide array of accessories that put your sense of style on display and help guard against the unexpected.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Sport Bar

  • Enhance your Frontier’s rugged off-road looks with a bed-mounted Sport Bar
  • Includes integrated LED brake and bed lights
  • Features Frontier logos on both sides

MSRP $1,204 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

FRONTIER INTERIOR ACCESSORIES

Interior designer: you

Showcase your creativity with a wide array of accessories. Take the time to choose pieces that best express your personality.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
All-Season Floor Mats — High Wall Liners (3-piece set)

  • Stepping in from the rain or snow? You need a set of All-Season Floor Mats — High Wall Liners
  • Custom-made of durable and long-wearing material
  • Driver and front-passenger mats secure with a grommet hole/positioning hook system

MSRP $211 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

  • Each cable is 1 meter in length

MSRP $84 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

html_content.value:
FRONTIER NISMO® OFF ROAD ACCESSORIES

Elite equipment

Enhance and customize your Frontier with NISMO accessories engineered to help provide next-level performance.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Frontier NISMO Off Road Suspension Lift Kit

MSRP $320 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

  • Get more clearance, improved tire fitment, and more aggressive looks with this 1.5" lift kit
  • Includes 1.5" front strut spacers, 1.0" rear axle blocks, extended leaf spring U-bolts, and aluminum bump stop extension plates to lift and level your Frontier
  • Constructed of high-quality steel and aluminum
  • Coated for corrosion protection and durability

Frontier NISMO Off Road Bronze Axis Wheels

MSRP $317 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

  • Specifications: 17x7.5" 6x114.3-mm bolt pattern, +30-mm backspacing
  • Load-rated for 1,950 lbs. (above factory OEM spec)
  • Designed and tested to rigorous SAE J2530 standards
  • Includes NISMO Center Caps
  • Also available in Graphite color
  • 4-piece set

Frontier NISMO Off Road Roof Rack

MSRP $999 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

  • No-drill application utilizing door jamb clamps for rigid mounting on vehicle
  • Durable and weather-resistant black powder-coated aluminum
  • Max. weight: 150 lbs. evenly distributed, including rack
  • Overall dimensions: 64" long x 48" wide

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
YAKIMA® Adventure Accessories

Pack More. Explore Further.

Equip your Frontier with Yakima®’s premium adventure accessories, designed to maximize your cargo space and make every journey more convenient. From roof racks to cargo solutions, Yakima® helps you bring along everything you need for the road ahead.
